tasks.name: Pilot: Baseline ReLU SAE
tasks.description: Train Baseline L1 SAE on synthetic data. 1024 features, seed 42. Verify convergence, compute absorption rate with corrected dead latent percentages and sanity checks.

pilot.pass_criteria: Converges (loss plateau); dead_latents_pct computable; sanity checks pass; absorption rate computable

tasks.name: Pilot: Random SAE Control
tasks.description: Create untrained random dictionary SAE as control. Compute absorption rate to validate metric discrimination.

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorption rate is computable; serves as upper bound reference; sanity checks pass

tasks.name: Pilot: Statistical Analysis and Sanity Checks
tasks.description: Run statistical tests (Welch's t-test, Cohen's d) on pilot results. Verify cross-variant MCC variation. Generate pilot_summary.json.

pilot.pass_criteria: Statistical tests complete; MCC variation > 0.01 across variants; pilot_summary.json generated
